unlock_requirement: Unlocks only after main Quest 250 completion and defeat of the final Astral Sovereign-class postgame gate condition.
story_purpose: Turn the sky wardens from a hidden order into the shield of veyr; this quest advances Sky Warden authority without creating or instantiating Torinn Rhogar as an NPC asset.
subquests: 1. Receive the sealed order from Torinn Rhogar and verify the postgame unlock seal against the Astral Sovereign defeat record.
2. Inspect the Open Sky Tribunal, mark hazards, and log any skyship, ward, or anomaly damage on the Sky Warden operations slate.
3. Coordinate with the Bluewing Cadre, then clear the required route without allowing civilian or ship systems to fail.
godly_reward_name: Reality Shard Relic of the Founderless Oath
